a:r.a:t: 5 Quick Wins — Each Achievable in Days
Five high-value gaps that are each self-contained changes to a single file or module. No architectural rework required.
No endpoint to export a session as JSON/Markdown/PDF. Users can't archive or migrate conversations.
No paginated GET for conversation messages — client must load entire history at once.
Rollback exists but no way to diff two skill versions or branch from history without destructive rollback.
graph_query_cache_ttl_seconds is configured in Settings but never wired to Neo4jGraphStore._query().
Wrap _query() with TTL-based lru_cache using config value; expose hit-rate metric to EventSink
_prepare_synthesis_docs() ranks by title overlap only — no explicit confidence attached to retrieved evidence.
Compute RelevanceScore(bm25+semantic+recency) per doc in synthesis.py; pass scores in evidence JSON to LLM
api/main.py, rag/graph_store.py, rag/synthesis.py — all five are isolated single-file changes
